category_title: Ninth-grade students with learning disabilities in inclusive core academic classrooms
scenario_title: Independent warm-up activity with context clues worksheet
minimal_context: The student is expected to complete a 15-minute independent warm-up worksheet on context clues at their desk.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright, it's time for our 15-minute warm-up. Please get your pen out and start working on the context clues worksheet on your desk.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Staring at the wall, not holding a pen) I don't want to do this right now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to complete the worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the paper but doesn't pick up the pen) These words don't even make sense. I don't know how to do context clues.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just read the sentences and try to figure it out.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the worksheet away, eyes and head not oriented towards the assignment) No, I'm not doing it. It's too hard and I'm not going to sit here and do this.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Alright, it's time for our 15-minute warm-up. Please get your pen out and start working on the context clues worksheet on your desk.

STUDENT: (Staring at the wall, not holding a pen) I don't want to do this right now.

TUTOR: You need to complete the worksheet.

STUDENT: (Looks at the paper but doesn't pick up the pen) These words don't even make sense. I don't know how to do context clues.

TUTOR: Just read the sentences and try to figure it out.

STUDENT: (Pushes the worksheet away, eyes and head not oriented towards the assignment) No, I'm not doing it. It's too hard and I'm not going to sit here and do this.

task.content: Completing a 15-minute independent warm-up activity involving previously instructed material or material that could potentially appear on the state’s high stakes test, specifically using context clues for problems on an independent worksheet

context.environment: Inclusive core academic classrooms for English I or Algebra I
context.materials: Independent seatwork assignments, independent worksheet, pen/pencil
context.social_setting: Special education teachers circulated among the students to provide individual assistance in a 'one teaches, one assists' co-teaching model
context.time_context: First 15 minutes of a 45–55 minute class duration

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When presented difﬁcult tasks and academic demands
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Display challenging behaviours such as low levels of motivation, poor frustration tolerance, and resistance to academic demands
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Struggle with class content and/or disengagement

behavior_patterns.condition: Time not attending to classroom instruction or completing teacher-assigned tasks
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Eyes and head not oriented towards independent seatwork assignments or work materials; not holding a pen/pencil and writing
